conversation.customInstructions: This fixture is for One Works source debugging. Keep changes small, preserve deterministic files, and prefer commands that work with Node.js built-ins.

startupPresets.title: Debug smoke
startupPresets.description: Check config loading, file links, and run command wiring.
startupPresets.prompt: Read README.md and fixtures/notes.md, then report whether file links and run commands are visible.

builtinActions.title: Repro note
builtinActions.description: Turn a UI or runtime symptom into a compact repro checklist.
builtinActions.prompt: Convert the current symptom into a reproducible checklist for this fixture workspace.
